sources.label: Hammer arXiv
sources.notes: On-device function calling via function masking.

sources.label: Magnet arXiv
sources.notes: Multi-turn tool-use trajectory synthesis via graph translation.

reference_repo_influences: paper2code: pack report classifies APIGen/ToolACE/Hammer/Magnet by specified vs paper-only vs code-confirmed.
DeepPaperNote: source manifest keeps multiple papers and repos separated.
MinerU-Document-Explorer: pack can later become indexed multi-paper explorer corpus.
paper-qa: cross-paper QA is needed before selecting data ratios as load-bearing policy.
MinerU: PDF extraction is the right next pass for exact table/algorithm locators.
docling-mcp: conversion fallback supports pack-level document ingestion.
algorithm_traits: LoRA/QLoRA framework references are not MAformac training permission

maformac_insertion_points.recommendation: Extend candidate data quality gate for diversity, variants, lineage, and negative composition.
Keep current MLX SFT substrate; upstream DeepSpeed/LLaMA-Factory is not adopted.
Use D-domain concrete tools as synthetic data schema source.
Future generator should sample from generated tool catalog and record source snapshot.
Generated positives must be paired with irrelevance/no-call/clarify counterexamples.

openspec_candidates: Future C5 design: generator SHALL record source snapshot digest, parent overlap, and negative ratio.
Future C5 design: function masking MAY be tested only after tool-surface mismatch is closed.

gate.rationale: Highest-value source group for C5 data generation design, but must remain gated and proposal-only.
stop_conditions: No generated data without leakage and lineage gates.

residual_risks: Pack-level official_repo is intentionally not_applicable: xLAM and Hammer local-code evidence applies only to their own claims, not to ToolACE or Magnet.
ToolACE and Magnet have not been code-confirmed in this pass.
xLAM repo working tree shows interrupted-clone dirtiness but local code files and HEAD are readable.
Exact data ratio choices still need MAformac-specific spike.
